headers._doc: Round-3 R2-NEW-5/6 fix: JWKS must not be CDN/edge-cached during a key-rotation grace window. Without this, browser tabs loaded before rotation continue verifying against the OLD key for up to the default Firebase Hosting cache TTL (~1h) even after a new JWKS publishes — defeating the per-kid validity-window enforcement. no-store + must-revalidate forces every verifier to fetch fresh.
